home.heroSub: Luxury jackets hand-crafted for those who refuse to blend in.
home.why1Text: Every jacket carries an edition number. Once sold, it is never identically reproduced. To own an AzaRatti piece is to own something truly unique in the world.
home.why2Text: Every piece is born from artisanal know-how. Carefully selected noble materials, meticulous tailoring, and absolute attention to detail — from the first thread to the final button.
home.why3Text: Your build, your colors, your fabric. Every detail can be customized so your piece is exactly you, and no one else.

boutique.title: The Collection
boutique.sub: 15 unique pieces. Once worn, never reproduced.

product.customText: Color, fabric, cut — everything can be adapted to your silhouette and preferences.

maison.title: Maison AzaRatti
maison.sub: One vision. One obsession. Every piece, unique.
maison.chapter1Text: AzaRatti 1 of 1 was born from a deep conviction: in a world saturated with fast fashion and mass production, something essential was missing — a house where every jacket tells a story that belongs only to its owner. Founded in West Africa, AzaRatti carries the soul of a continent where craftsmanship is not a luxury, but a living tradition.
maison.chapter2Text: "1 of 1" is not just a name — it is a commitment. Every piece is numbered, hand-crafted, and will never be identically reproduced. We believe true luxury is not measured in price, but in uniqueness: owning something no one else in the world possesses.
maison.chapter3Text: We are building a fashion house that will radiate from Africa to the entire world. In the years ahead, AzaRatti aspires to join the circle of great couture houses — not by imitating, but by creating its own language, rooted in artisanal excellence and a resolutely contemporary vision.
maison.v1Text: Every piece is an absolute original.
maison.v2Text: No compromise on material and craft quality.
maison.v4Text: Creating without limits, for those who dare to stand out.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: AzaRatti 1 of 1 places paramount importance on protecting your personal data. This policy explains what data we collect, why, how we use it, and what your rights are.

cookies.title: Your cookie settings
cookies.text: We use cookies to ensure the site works properly, remember your preferences (language, cart) and improve your experience.

footer.madeWith: Crafted with passion from West Africa.
